summary: Agent1 considered historical data from similar medical practices but found no direct correlation due to lack of specific studies mentioning exact angles or torques used in this particular type of orthodontic device. Given that other comparable methods suggest moderately strong yet safe pressures around 200 grams, they concluded it was likely close enough based on general principles applied here too. To refine further would require more specialized literature focusing precisely on these devices if existing at all beyond indirect comparisons made possible through broader knowledge bases about dental mechanics broadly speaking rather than just one model alone specifically designed differently perhaps requiring unique calibration steps not covered widely even among experts working closely
